Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class PlannedActivityCreate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.PlannedActivityCreate
public class PlannedActivityCreate extends Object
PlannedActivityCreate

Details the customer's intended trading and banking-related activities at the time of account application; informs risk checks and forms a baseline for anomalous activity detection
